name: io.github.charleslucas/poe-data-mcp
title: poe-data-mcp - Path of Exile game data
description: MCP server for Path of Exile game data: wiki, economy, and Craft of Exile lookups

environmentVariables.name: POE_DATA_MCP_CACHE_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Directory for the Craft of Exile data cache. Defaults to the platform user-cache dir (e.g. %LOCALAPPDATA%/poe-data-mcp on Windows, ~/.cache/poe-data-mcp elsewhere).
